Court orders the parites to Dept. 603 forthwith for settlement conference before Pang Ly, Esq. Parties are to return at 11:50 to Dept. 318 for status of settlement.

Court finds that this case should have been co-ordinated with Case No. CGC-16-555355. Accordingly, subject to the outcome of further proceeds in case 555355, if any, the within Small Claims Appeal is continued to May 12, 2017, for Trial at 9:15 in Dept. 318.
